actions.name: build_chart_url
actions.description: Build a QuickChart image URL from a Chart.js configuration without downloading the rendered image.

chart.description: The Chart.js configuration object to render with QuickChart.

width.description: The chart image width in pixels.

height.description: The chart image height in pixels.

devicePixelRatio.description: The output device pixel ratio. QuickChart accepts 1 or 2.

backgroundColor.description: The chart canvas background color as a CSS color, such as transparent, white, or #ffffff.

version.description: The Chart.js version to use, such as 2, 3, 4, or a valid Chart.js version string.

format.description: The image format QuickChart should render.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for building a QuickChart chart image URL.

url.description: The QuickChart URL that renders the chart image.

actions.name: build_qr_url
actions.description: Build a QuickChart QR code image URL for text, URLs, or other compact QR payloads.

text.description: The text or URL to encode in the QR code.

size.description: The QR code width and height in pixels.

margin.description: The QR code margin in modules.

dark.description: The dark module color as a CSS color or hex color.

light.description: The light module color as a CSS color or hex color.

ecLevel.description: The QR code error correction level.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for building a QuickChart QR code URL.

url.description: The QuickChart URL that renders the QR code image.

outputSchema.description: The generated QuickChart QR code URL.

actions.name: create_chart_short_url
actions.description: Create a QuickChart short URL for a Chart.js configuration and return the URL plus creation metadata.

chart.description: The Chart.js configuration object to render with QuickChart.

width.description: The chart image width in pixels.

height.description: The chart image height in pixels.

devicePixelRatio.description: The output device pixel ratio. QuickChart accepts 1 or 2.

backgroundColor.description: The chart canvas background color as a CSS color, such as transparent, white, or #ffffff.

version.description: The Chart.js version to use, such as 2, 3, 4, or a valid Chart.js version string.

format.description: The image format QuickChart should render.

key.description: An optional QuickChart API key for paid-account short URL retention.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a QuickChart chart short URL.

success.description: Whether QuickChart reported the short URL creation as successful.

anyOf.description: The generated short URL for rendering the chart.

raw.description: The raw JSON payload returned by QuickChart.

outputSchema.description: The QuickChart short URL creation response.
